title: One Global Power, One Regional Power, Two Different Goals
summary_full: The U.S. is a superpower that views Iran through a prism of global responsibilities and strategic goals. Israel has a more regional approach. After three weeks of war, their paths are diverging.
summary_public: The U.S. is a superpower that views Iran through a prism of global responsibilities and strategic goals. Israel has a more regional approach. After three weeks of war, their paths are diverging.

IL.label: neutral
IL.evidence: Israel has a more regional approach.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: views Iran through a prism of global responsibilities
